questions.question: Complete the truth table for the logical connective 'AND' (∧) for the following propositions: p and q. What is the output when either p or q is false?
questions.hint: Show all possible combinations of truth values for p and q

questions.question: What is the effect of adding the negation connective (¬) to the output of a simple 'OR' (∨) connective? Provide a truth table to support your answer.
questions.hint: Use the truth table for 'OR' (∨) to help you

questions.question: A compound proposition is formed using the logical connective 'NOT' (¬) and two simple propositions p and q. If p is true, what is the output of the compound proposition p → (q ∧ r)?
questions.hint: Use the rules of implication and conjunction
